hero.subtitle: Get accurate, real-time, AI-backed salary estimates based on your skills, experience, and role.
about.title: About System
about.desc: Designed to make it easier for HRD and management to determine remuneration standards. Data is sent directly to our AI API to be processed in seconds.
prediction.section.title: Start Salary Prediction
prediction.section.desc: Enter employee data to get a salary estimate based on predetermined parameters.
pred.form.name: Employee Name
pred.result.title: Salary Prediction Result
pred.result.desc1: Based on the entered data, the estimated salary for
pred.result.insight: Based on the {divisi} division and position as {jabatan}, this estimate reflects market standards for the role in the current technology industry.
pred.error.age: Age is required and must be between 18 and 65 years old.
pred.error.notFound: Salary data for the specified division and position was not found.
footer.desc: We are here to simplify complexity, turn ideas into innovation, and ensure every technology we build has a real impact on your business.
forecast.page.desc: Optimize your division's financial planning with high precision through smart calculations based on organizational structure and employee status.
forecast.page.cardDesc: Integrates a Supervised Learning model to predict remuneration standards automatically. The system dynamically adjusts data input with annual division growth for more accurate results.
forecast.result.title: Budget Forecast Result
forecast.result.insightTitle: Estimated budget requirements for the future.
forecast.result.growthDesc: Considers a monthly growth rate of {rate}% for the {division} division.
forecast.error.targetMonth: Target month must be greater than current month.
forecast.error.minCount: At least one employee count must be greater than 0.
forecast.error.unknown: An error occurred while calculating the forecast.
employees.page.desc: Manage and monitor all employee data for system prediction needs.
employees.form.manualGaji: Manual Salary Input (If not, salary will be automatically estimated by ML Model)
employees.modal.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this data? This action
